name: osm-static-map-generator
description: Native Node.js addon for generating static map images from OpenStreetMap tiles
author: Andrea Mancuso

scripts.build:prebuild:win32-x64: npx rimraf build && cmake-js rebuild && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('prebuilds/win32-x64',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('build/Release/osm-static-map-generator.node','prebuilds/win32-x64/node.napi.node');"
scripts.build:prebuild:win32-arm64: npx rimraf build && cmake-js rebuild --arch arm64 && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('prebuilds/win32-arm64',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('build/Release/osm-static-map-generator.node','prebuilds/win32-arm64/node.napi.node');"
scripts.build:prebuild:linux-x64: npx rimraf build && cmake-js rebuild && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('prebuilds/linux-x64',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('build/Release/osm-static-map-generator.node','prebuilds/linux-x64/node.napi.node');"
scripts.build:prebuild:linux-arm64: npx rimraf build && cmake-js rebuild && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('prebuilds/linux-arm64',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('build/Release/osm-static-map-generator.node','prebuilds/linux-arm64/node.napi.node');"
scripts.build:prebuild:darwin-arm64: npx rimraf build && cmake-js rebuild && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('prebuilds/darwin-arm64',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('build/Release/osm-static-map-generator.node','prebuilds/darwin-arm64/node.napi.node');"
